hero.subtitle: We help businesses grow with web development, custom software, process automation and positioning strategies. More results, less time.

whoWeAre.title: Why we do what we do
whoWeAre.text: We believe technology should be an equalizer. That a 5-person company can compete with a 50-person one. That the tools once reserved for big corporations should be within anyone's reach.
whoWeAre.text2: That's why we created Paforo: to help real businesses save time, automate the repetitive stuff and focus on what truly matters — their clients, their team, their growth.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions to boost your digital presence and optimize your business processes.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Fast, accessible and conversion-optimized websites. Next.js, React and cutting-edge technologies.

software.description: Custom software to automate and scale your business. APIs, dashboards, integrations.

automation.title: Automations
automation.description: Automate repetitive processes and free up time for what matters. Workflows, bots, integrations.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: No fluff. We understand your business, execute fast and measure everything.

steps.title: We listen
steps.description: We sit down with you, understand what you need and what real problem we're solving. No jargon, no smoke.

steps.title: We propose a clear plan
steps.description: We present what we'll do, with what timelines and what results to expect. If it doesn't make sense, we tell you.

steps.title: We build and launch
steps.description: Iterative development with weekly deliveries. You see progress in real time and can give feedback every sprint.

steps.title: We measure and improve
steps.description: After launch, we measure the real impact. Data, not assumptions. And we keep optimizing.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Our clients' satisfaction is our best introduction.

cta.title: Free consultation for your business
cta.subtitle: We listen, analyze your processes and show you how AI and automation can save you real time. No strings attached, no fine print.

footer.description: Digital solutions agency. Web development, custom software, process automation, SEO and GEO.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: We answer the most common questions about our services and how we work.

items.question: How much does a project with Paforo cost?
items.answer: Every project is unique. We work with fixed budgets starting from €2,000 for websites and €5,000 for custom software. We'll send you a detailed quote within 48 hours, no strings attached.

items.question: How long does a web project take?
items.answer: A corporate website is typically ready in 3-4 weeks. Custom software projects range from 6-12 weeks depending on complexity. Always with weekly deliveries so you can track progress.

items.question: Do you work with companies from any country?
items.answer: Yes. We work remotely with clients anywhere in the world. Our process is 100% remote-ready, no matter where you are.

items.question: What happens after the project is delivered?
items.answer: We offer ongoing support and maintenance. We monitor performance, apply security updates and keep optimizing based on real data.

items.question: Can I see results before committing?
items.answer: Yes. In our first meeting, we show you a clear proposal with measurable goals. No fine print, no lock-in. If you don't see value, we don't continue.

about.title: About Paforo
about.subtitle: We are a digital agency specialized in helping businesses grow in the digital world.
about.previewTitle: A digital agency that speaks your language
about.previewText: We're a team that combines cutting-edge technology with common sense. No unnecessary jargon, no smoke and mirrors. Just solutions that work and results you can measure.
about.missionText: Democratize access to quality digital solutions for mid-sized companies, combining cutting-edge technology with proven growth strategies.
about.iaSubtitle: AI has changed the game. What only large corporations could afford is now within reach of any business.

iaItems.before: A team of 10 people to handle phone calls
iaItems.after: An AI voicemail that transcribes and replies for you

iaItems.before: Custom software costing hundreds of thousands
Months of analysis to make a decision

about.iaClosing: At Paforo we believe technology should be an equalizer. That a 5-person company can compete with a 50-person one. And that people should spend their time on what truly matters: building real connections, taking care of their clients and growing their business. The repetitive, boring, mechanical work? Let technology handle that.

valuesItems.title: Results
valuesItems.description: We focus on real metrics and measurable ROI.
